summary: Completed comprehensive testing of e-commerce platform. Backend APIs fully functional (21/21 tests passed). Frontend UI working with minor navigation timing issues during automated testing, but all core functionality verified.
passed_tests: Backend cart functionality (add, update, remove items)
Backend admin endpoints (stats, products, orders, users)
Backend shipping calculation with courier tax
Frontend homepage loads with 6+ seeded products
Frontend user registration and login flows
Frontend auth session persistence with cookies
Frontend dashboard access for authenticated users
Frontend admin panel with tabs (products, orders, users)
Frontend protected routes redirect to login
